entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: A grain legume crop (Cajanus cajan) essential for subsistence farming in semi-arid tropical regions

entities.name: GRAIN LEGUME
entities.description: A group of plants that produce seeds in pods and are used as a source of protein

entities.name: SUBSISTENCE FARMING SYSTEMS
entities.description: Agricultural systems where farmers grow food primarily for their own consumption

entities.name: SEMI-ARID TROPICS
entities.description: A geographical region characterized by low and irregular rainfall and high temperatures

entities.name: FUNGI
entities.description: A group of spore-producing organisms that can act as causal agents for pigeonpea diseases

entities.name: VIRUSES
entities.description: Submicroscopic infectious agents that can attack pigeonpea

entities.name: NEMATODES
entities.description: Microscopic roundworms that can act as pests or disease vectors for pigeonpea

entities.name: BACTERIA
entities.description: Single-celled microorganisms that can cause diseases in pigeonpea

entities.name: MYCOPLASMA-LIKE ORGANISMS
entities.description: Small organisms lacking a cell wall that can attack pigeonpea

entities.name: PIGEONPEA DISEASES
entities.description: Pathological conditions affecting the health and production of pigeonpea

entities.name: CAUSAL AGENTS
entities.description: The biological organisms responsible for the onset of diseases

entities.name: DISTRIBUTION
entities.description: The geographical area where specific pigeonpea diseases are found

entities.name: ECONOMIC IMPORTANCE
entities.description: The degree of financial loss or impact caused by pigeonpea diseases

entities.name: SYMPTOMS
entities.description: The physical manifestations of diseases in pigeonpea plants

entities.name: EPIDEMIOLOGY
entities.description: The study of the patterns, causes, and effects of pigeonpea diseases

entities.name: MANAGEMENT
entities.description: The overall approach to controlling and reducing the impact of pigeonpea diseases

entities.name: DIAGNOSTIC KEY
entities.description: A tool used for the systematic identification of pigeonpea diseases

entities.name: CONTROL MEASURES
entities.description: Specific actions taken to prevent or mitigate pigeonpea diseases

entities.description: Pigeonpea cultivars that possess genetic traits to withstand specific diseases

entities.name: CULTURAL PRACTICES
